name: Arroz Con Queso
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except 1 cup of the grated cheese.
2. Mix thoroughly until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Pour the mixture into a well-greased slow cooker.
4. Cover and cook on low setting for 6 to 9 hours.
5. Just before serving, sprinkle with the reserved grated cheese.
6. Serve and enjoy!
